zh.lifeSummary: 當Manus  Mhor O'Donnell於1501年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾利福德時，他的父親King Hugh Roe O'Donnell74歲，母親Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond51歲。他於1514年與Judith Ni ÓNéill在英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍斯特拉巴結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1564年2月9日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾多聶加爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Manus  Mhor O'Donnell于1501年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾利福德时，他的父亲King Hugh Roe O'Donnell74岁，母亲Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond51岁。他于1514年与Judith Ni ÓNéill在英国北爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍斯特拉巴结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1564年2月9日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾多聶加爾。

nameMeanings.name: O'Donnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Niall, Siobhan, Brennan, Bridie, Declan, Donal, Fergus, Jarlath, John Patrick, Padraic.

Irish (Donegal, Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Domhnaill ‘descendant of Domhnall’, an old personal name composed of the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Compare the Anglicized form Donald and the Scottish clan name McDonald .

History: The O'Donnells, like the O'Neills (see   O'Neill  ), claim descent from Niall of the Nine Hostages (Niall Noígíallach), a legendary 5th-century king of Ireland. Their traditional base is Tyrconnell (i.e. Donegal).

variants.name: O'Daniel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Donnell  , influenced by the Biblical name   Daniel  , to which it is etymologically unrelated.

variants.name: O'Donald
meanings: Irish: Scotticized form of O'Donnell . The Irish personal name Domhnall was Latinized as Donaldus, which is the source of Donald, the form of the personal name used in English in Scotland, though not in Ireland. The form O'Donald is therefore a 19th-century hybrid. Compare Donald .

variants.name: Donald
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McDonald (Mac Dhomhnaill), from the Gaelic personal name Domhnall; found in 13th- and 14th-century Scotland as Dofnald, Douenald, Dufenald, and Donald.
Irish (Ulster): possibly also a shortened and altered form of Irish   O'Donell  .

nameMeanings.name: Manus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Mhor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Manus  Mhor O'Donnell was born in 1501, in Lifford, County Donegal, Ireland, his father, King Hugh Roe O'Donnell, was 74 and his mother, Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond, was 51. He married Judith Ni ÓNéill in 1514, in Strabane, County Tyrone, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 9 February 1564, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Donegal, Donegal, County Donegal, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Manus  Mhor O'Donnell est né en 1501, à Lifford, County Donegal, Irlande, son père, King Hugh Roe O'Donnell, avait 74 ans et sa mère, Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Judith Ni ÓNéill en 1514, à Strabane, County Tyrone, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 9 février 1564, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Donegal, Donegal, County Donegal, Irlande.

Er hat 1514 in Strabane, County Tyrone, Nordirland, United Kingdom Judith Ni ÓNéill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 9. ko.lifeSummary: Manus  Mhor O'Donnell(이)가 1501년 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸 리퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Hugh Roe O'Donnell(은)는 74세였고, 그의 어머니 Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1514년 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 타이론 스트라반에서 Judith Ni ÓNéill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1564년 2월 9일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸 도네걸 도네걸에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Judith Ni ÓNéill em 1514, em Strabane, County Tyrone, Irlanda do Norte, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.Portnatrynod Castle, Strabane, Tyrone, N: страбан, коунти тироун, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Manus  Mhor O'Donnell родился в 1501 г. в местности лиффорд, коунти доунегаль, Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Hugh Roe O'Donnell было 74 года, а матери, которую звали Fionnghuala Ni Bhriain of Thomond, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Ni ÓNéill в 1514 г. в местности страбан, коунти тироун, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 9 февраля 1564 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности доунегаль, доунегаль, коунти доунегаль, Ирландия.
